personal.name: Vishwas Narayana
personal.title: Agentic AI Architect | Startup Scout | Technical Trainer
personal.tagline: Building the future of AI-driven platforms, scouting high-potential startups, and empowering engineers through mentorship and innovation.
personal.bio: I'm a passionate technologist with a lifelong obsession for AI, algorithms, and solving real-world problems. My journey spans AI acceleration, platform engineering, DevRel, and mentorship. I thrive at the intersection of technology, community, and innovation, with expertise in Python, C++, deep learning, and cloud-native platforms.
personal.currentRoleDescription: Scouting high-potential startups for AI acceleration and reinventing enterprise AI adoption. Designing agentic AI systems to solve complex challenges and collaborating with founders to drive innovation.

about.title: About
sections: I'm an Agentic AI Architect, Startup Scout, and Technical Trainer with a focus on AI acceleration, platform engineering, and mentorship. My work bridges the gap between cutting-edge technology and real-world impact, from building scalable AI platforms to empowering the next generation of engineers.

With experience in startups, enterprise AI, and DevRel, I specialize in Python, C++, deep learning, and cloud-native architectures. I love tackling complex challenges and creating solutions that scale.
In my spare time, I contribute to open-source projects, host technical workshops, and explore emerging technologies like neurohacking and vector databases.

experience.title: Agentic AI Architect
experience.description: Scout and evaluate high-potential startups for AI acceleration and enterprise integration. Design and implement agentic AI systems to solve complex challenges. Collaborate with founders to reinvent AI adoption in traditional industries.

experience.title: Founder
experience.description: Building a cutting-edge AI and data engineering platform to empower startups. Leading product development, focusing on scalability, automation, and AI-driven insights. Mentoring engineers to foster innovation and technical excellence.

experience.title: MLOps Engineer
experience.description: Develop and deploy ML pipelines for real-time inference and batch processing. Optimize model-serving infrastructure using Kubernetes, Docker, and serverless architectures. Implement CI/CD pipelines for seamless model deployment.

experience.title: DevRel Lead
experience.company: Future Sense Infinity Media, Bangalore, India
experience.description: Led developer relations initiatives, including workshops, hackathons, and technical content creation. Bridged the gap between engineering teams and developer communities through education and advocacy.

projects.title: OrionOps AI Platform
projects.description: A scalable AI and data engineering platform for startups, focusing on automation and AI-driven insights.
projects.longDescription: Founded and built OrionOps to provide startups with tools for rapid AI development and deployment. The platform integrates MLOps, data pipelines, and real-time analytics to empower engineers and data scientists.

projects.title: BuildPiper Show
projects.description: Educational series on DevOps and microservices for developers.
projects.longDescription: Created and hosted the BuildPiper Show, featuring workshops, interviews with DevOps leaders, and tutorials to help developers master microservices, CI/CD, and cloud-native architectures.

projects.title: #proudengineer Movement
projects.description: Global initiative to celebrate and empower engineers through community-building and mentorship.
projects.longDescription: Launched the #proudengineer movement to recognize engineers worldwide. The initiative includes social campaigns, mentorship programs, and resources to support professional growth and innovation.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology (BTech), Electrical, Electronics & Communications Engineering

certifications.name: Introduction to Vector Indexes and Unstructured Data
